title: Ender Crop: Regrown
description: Adds craftable ender crop seeds that will grow and produce ender pearls.
body: See description here: [Original Ender Crop Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/ender-crop) This version is continuation that is updated for 1.21.1 Please post any issues/errors on the [GitHub Issue Page](https://github.com/ericfisherdev/ender-crop-regrown/issues) ![Ender Crop Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bed047439f503ce705a834d0467893f44018298d.png) **Note: This is an updated/forked version of [the original](https://modrinth.com/mod/ender-crop) for MC 1.21 and on. This version will be abandonded if the original mod author releases further updates. Currently, no functionality changes have been made to the mod outside of porting it to 1.21.1. ## **The Crop** ![ender crop growth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d53d3e845f574dd0cbc9cab93231ff3f6785ba72.webp) The ender crop has 8 growth stages. Harvesting it at any stage will drop Ender Seeds, at the 8th stage it will drop 1-2 Ender Pearls and sometimes an extra seed. ## **Growth** On farmland: Follows vanilla Minecraft growth rules, but at 50% the rate of wheat. Requires light level < 7 to grow (redstone torch). On tilled end stone: Follows vanilla Minecraft growth rules at the same rate as wheat. Requires any light level. 1 in 50 chance to spawn an endermite on harvest. (configurable). ## **The Seeds** ![ender crop seed recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/feac999de216a2c7161c1eb3101f049e4814ff32.png) Ender seeds can be found in dungeons and are as rare as golden apples. (configurable) They can also be crafted by surrounding wheat seeds with 4 ender pearls: ## **Tilled End Stone (configurable)** To obtain tilled end stone you simply right-click regular end stone with a hoe that has been enchanted with Unbreaking I or a hoe-like tool (AIOT, Kama, Scythe) with mining level 1 (Stone).
